name: create_board
description: Create a new board for the authenticated user with a name, optional description, and privacy setting. Boards serve as containers for organizing pins by topic or theme.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the board (max 50 characters).

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: A description of the board's purpose or theme.
parameters.example: Easy and delicious recipes for weekend cooking

parameters.name: privacy
parameters.description: Board visibility. One of: PUBLIC, PROTECTED (secret board).

body.name: Weekend Recipes
body.description: Easy and delicious recipes for weekend cooking

body.name: Weekend Recipes
body.description: Easy and delicious recipes for weekend cooking
